headline: Built for Hungry Baboons
subheadline: AI-powered sales tools to streamline cold-calling and commission-based B2B growth for software startups

challenges.title: Limited Team Size
challenges.desc: With only two employees, Hungry Baboons struggles to handle daily operations and sales outreach. This creates bottlenecks in cold-calling efforts for software startups. Resource allocation suffers in a commission-based model.

challenges.title: Sales Scalability
challenges.desc: As a small Finland-based firm, expanding B2B sales without fixed costs is challenging. Cold-calling campaigns often lack tools for tracking leads. This hinders reaching the tipping point for client growth.

challenges.title: Operational Efficiency
challenges.desc: Managing administrative and sales tasks with a tiny team slows down processes. In a public company context, coordinating customer development is tough. This impacts overall productivity in advertising services.

challenges.title: Commission Tracking
challenges.desc: Tracking hefty commissions from B2B deals is complex with limited staff. Errors in monitoring profits can lead to disputes with startups. This affects the omnisales model reliability in Finland.

deliverables.title: Sales Automation System
deliverables.desc: Builds automated lead tracking integrated with cold-calling workflows to boost B2B efficiency

deliverables.title: Commission Calculator
deliverables.desc: Creates a tool for accurate commission tracking that integrates with sales data to reduce errors

deliverables.title: Customer Development Platform
deliverables.desc: Develops a platform for managing customer interactions that links with existing tools for startup growth

deliverables.title: Resource Optimization Dashboard
deliverables.desc: Designs a dashboard to allocate tasks efficiently for small teams, reducing operational bottlenecks

engagementSteps.title: Assessment Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: Review current sales processes and identify key pain points for Hungry Baboons.

engagementSteps.title: Design and Build
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: Develop and customize AI tools based on the assessment for B2B sales optimization.

engagementSteps.title: Implementation and Training
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: Integrate the new system and train the team on usage for ongoing operations.

faqItems.question: What is AI-powered sales infrastructure?
faqItems.answer: It uses AI to automate and optimize sales processes like lead generation and tracking.

faqItems.question: How does this fit our small team?
faqItems.answer: Tools are designed for efficiency with minimal staff, focusing on Finland-based operations.

faqItems.question: Will this integrate with our current tools?
faqItems.answer: Yes, it integrates with systems like LinkedIn for B2B sales and cold-calling workflows.

faqItems.question: What are the costs involved?
faqItems.answer: Costs are tailored to your commission-based model with no fixed fees for Hungry Baboons.

faqItems.question: How long until we see results?
faqItems.answer: Results typically appear within three months as we build and implement the infrastructure.

faqItems.question: Is this customizable for our needs?
faqItems.answer: Absolutely, it's specifically adapted for advertising services and software startup growth.

stackItems.name: Python

stackItems.name: LinkedIn
stackItems.role: Manages networking and lead generation for B2B sales

stackItems.name: CRM Software
stackItems.role: Tracks customer interactions and cold-calling efforts

stackItems.name: Google Sheets
stackItems.role: Supports data management and commission tracking

stackItems.role: Facilitates team communication in a small, remote Finland-based setup
